Name: Project Received
Description: Client intake complete. Lead captured in CRM. Project officially started.

Name: Brand Review
Description: Review and approve brand assets: logo colors, fonts, and app icon direction.

Name: Customization Review
Description: Review client customization form submission: app name, tagline, monetization model, and design preferences.

Name: Development
Description: App is being actively built by the development team based on approved customization.

Name: Testing
Description: Internal QA testing: functionality, performance, and platform compatibility checks.

Name: Demo Ready For Review
Description: Client-facing demo is ready. Client reviews the live build and provides feedback.

Name: Revision Window
Description: Approved revision requests are being implemented based on client demo feedback.

Name: Final Approval
Description: Client gives final sign-off on the completed app before moving to publishing.

Name: Publishing Requirements
Description: Collecting Apple and Google store credentials, app store listings, and publishing assets.

Name: Store Submission
Description: App submitted to Apple App Store and/or Google Play Store for review.

Name: App Launch
Description: App is live on the app stores. Launch complete.
